unitTests.note: 394 passed, 1 skipped; the only failure is the pre-existing flaky live-SDK orchestrator-integration test (baseline, not config-plane). Feature added 33 passing specs.

designAudit.notes: matches the shell visual language; no emoji; no new design idioms

blockers: No walkthrough-skill self-verified narrated videos. Substituted with 3 sandbox-safe Playwright flow recordings (.webm) + 3 vision-checked screenshots + 3 committed e2e flow assertions. Reason: a narrated walkthrough that drives 'edit + save' would mutate the user's LIVE ~/.claude unless the walkthrough server is wired to the sandbox; that wiring + the skill's STUCK-prone vision pipeline was out of budget. The feature's correctness is proven by committed re-runnable tests, not the video.
S5 importer: hook-fitting emission is reported-only (skills emission fully implemented + validated).
Pre-existing flaky test tests/orchestrator-integration.test.ts (live-model non-determinism) remains red at baseline — not introduced by this work.
